title: Guang Xia MTR
description: 这是广厦城mtr服务器的整合包 This is a package with many commonly used MTR construction tools
body:
# 这是一个MTR服务器的整合包
## 他拥有迷上城建、MSD、MTR以及其他的城建模组，欢迎你来我们服游玩
**mtr是我追加包的核心，让你更好的在游戏中建设你的地下长隆，我们为这一玩法准备了许多的装饰、辅助建设模组，希望你玩的开行，迷上城建提供快速建造工具和许多告示牌让游戏中的地铁更加真实，我们围绕着一玩法添加了许多附属模组让你快速、方便真实的建设。我们还有许多有意思的模组给你带来多元化的游戏体验，总之下载下来玩玩吧！！**
### english：
#This is an MTR integration package
##He has a fascination with urban construction,** MSD**, **MTR**, and other urban construction modules. Welcome to our server to play
**Mtr is the core of my add-on package, allowing you to better build your underground dragon in the game. We have prepared many decoration and auxiliary construction modules for this gameplay, hoping that you can enjoy it and become addicted to urban construction. We provide fast construction tools and many signs to make the subway in the game more realistic. We have added many auxiliary modules around this gameplay to make it quick and convenient for you to build it realistically. We have many interesting mods to bring you a diverse gaming experience. Download and play them anyway!!**
### modlist （模组清单）
- Applied Energistics 2
- Architectury API
- Better Runtime Resource Pack (BRRP)
- Decorative Blocks
- Joban Client Mod
- MTR London Underground Addon
- Minecraft Transit Railway
- Mishang Urban Construction
- Nemo's Transit Expansion
- Reality City Construction
- Slideshow(Fabric)
- Station Decoration
- Xaero's Minimap（[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)）
- Xaero's World Map(https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)
- aftersans53228's fabric road
